items.briefing:
A Microsoft survey warns that Australian organisations are falling behind on AI governance, meaning many businesses are using AI tools without proper policies or oversight in place — a growing security and compliance risk. Separately, the INC ransomware group continues to cause damage globally by exploiting basic security weaknesses, such as poor password practices and unpatched systems, which remain common vulnerabilities in Australian workplaces.

Google has rolled out a fake call detection feature for Android users, which can help identify scam phone calls in real time — useful protection given Australia's high rates of phone-based fraud.

**Practical tip:** Make sure your organisation has a clear policy on which AI tools staff are approved to use, and how sensitive information should be handled when using them.

featured.title: Mackay Sugar cyber attack flagged as broader risk to Australia’s food supply chain
featured.quote: Critical infrastructure attack on major food exporter highlights supply chain vulnerability.
